project: Agents as First-Class Team Members (PRD-agents-first-class v1.0)

features.name: Agents Table + CRUD API
features.spec: Create agents table (name, slug, avatar_url, description, persona, color, backbone_connection_id, model_override, max_concurrent_tasks, status, is_active, agent_type, tracking stats, config JSONB, migrated_from_category_id). AgentsService + AgentsController REST CRUD: POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE/pause/resume/clone under /accounts/:accountId/agents. AgentsModule registered in AppModule.
features.test: POST /accounts/:accountId/agents creates row; GET lists it; PATCH updates name; DELETE soft-deactivates (is_active=false). TypeScript build clean.

features.name: Polymorphic Task Assignment
features.spec: Add assignee_type (none|agent|human) and assignee_id to tasks table with partial indexes. TasksService auto-assigns task to column default_agent_id when task enters a step. Migration backfills existing tasks where category->agent mapping is clear via migrated_from_category_id.
features.test: Create task in column with default_agent_id set -> task.assignee_type='agent' and task.assignee_id matches agent. Tasks with no column default have assignee_type='none'.

features.name: Column Default Agent (board_steps)
features.spec: Add default_agent_id FK to board_steps replacing category_id. BackboneRouterService removes Category cascade level; Agent level replaces it (6 levels instead of 7). Migration maps existing board_steps.category_id -> default_agent_id via agents.migrated_from_category_id.
features.test: board_steps has default_agent_id column. BackboneRouter resolves agent backbone connection without category level. Existing board routes still work.

features.name: Agent Skills Junction Table
features.spec: Create agent_skills junction table replacing category_skills. AgentSkillsService: add/remove skills from agent. Endpoints: POST/DELETE /agents/:id/skills/:skillId. Migration copies category_skills -> agent_skills using migrated_from_category_id mapping.
features.test: POST /agents/:id/skills/:skillId links skill; DELETE removes it; GET /agents/:id returns skills array. Existing category skills appear on migrated agents.

features.name: Knowledge Docs on Agents
features.spec: Add agent_id FK to knowledge_docs table. Agents own knowledge directly; pod_id still available for shared knowledge. ConversationsService reads skills/knowledge from agent instead of category when agent_id present on the agent assigned to conversation.
features.test: knowledge_docs row with agent_id. ConversationsService builds context using agent skills + knowledge when conversation resolves to an agent. Existing pod knowledge still works.

features.name: Agent-Scoped Conversations
features.spec: Add agent_id FK to conversations table. Three scopes: task, pod, agent. ConversationsService injects agent persona into system prompt when agent_id present. New scope 'agent' usable via CreateConversationDto.
features.test: POST /conversations with agent_id -> conversation created. Sending message returns response using agent's persona. GET /conversations?agent_id= filters correctly.

features.name: Provider Agents Repointed + Sync Rewritten
features.spec: Add agent_id FK to provider_agents. AgentCompilerService and AgentSyncService read from agents table instead of categories. Content hashing uses agent persona + skills + knowledge. Migration maps provider_agents.category_id -> agent_id.
features.test: AgentSyncService syncs OpenClaw by agent_id. Changing agent persona triggers re-sync (hash mismatch). provider_agents.agent_id populated after migration.

features.name: Agent Activity Feed
features.spec: Create agent_activity table (agent_id, activity_type, payload JSONB, created_at). Types: task_completed, task_failed, task_assigned, conversation_reply, dag_created, route_triggered, status_changed, error. AgentActivityService.record() called from dag-executor, tasks.service, conversations.service, coordinator, board-routing. GET /agents/:id/activity endpoint.
features.test: Complete a task assigned to an agent -> activity row with type=task_completed. GET /agents/:id/activity returns feed sorted by created_at desc.

features.name: Agent Stats Aggregation
features.spec: DAGExecutorService calls AgentActivityService after task completion/failure to increment agents.total_tasks_completed, total_tasks_failed, total_tokens_used, last_active_at. Stats exposed in GET /agents/:id response.
features.test: Run a DAG with agent-assigned tasks -> agents row shows incremented total_tasks_completed and updated last_active_at.

features.name: Pilot Configs Migrated into Agents
features.spec: Each pilot_configs row becomes agents row with agent_type='pilot'. Add pilot_agent_id FK to pods. PilotService reads from agents where agent_type='pilot'. Config JSONB stores max_tasks_per_cycle, approval_required. Migration script creates pilot agents from pilot_configs.
features.test: Existing pilot configs appear as agents with type=pilot. PilotService finds pilot agent by pod.pilot_agent_id. Autonomy cycle still triggers correctly.

features.name: Coordinator Agent Integration + MCP Tools
features.spec: CoordinatorService uses coordinator-type agent. Coordinator prompt lists available agents with IDs, skills, descriptions so each generated DAG task is assigned to a specific agent. Register 3 MCP tools in mcp-entry.ts: create_agent, list_agents, assign_task_to_agent.
features.test: Decompose a goal -> generated tasks have assignee_id set. MCP tools callable. list_agents returns current agents list.

features.name: Agent Profiles in Team Views + Board Kanban Avatar
features.spec: Team roster (/dashboard/teams) shows agents section with status indicators (idle/working/paused/error/offline). Agent profile cards: name, avatar, description, backbone/model, skills, knowledge, performance stats, recent activity, action buttons. Board Kanban shows agent avatar on assigned task cards.
features.test: Playwright: /dashboard/teams shows Agents section with at least one agent card and status badge. Task card on Kanban shows avatar for agent-assigned tasks.

features.name: Agent Creation Wizard + Management Pages
features.spec: 4-step wizard: Identity -> Skills & Knowledge -> Configuration -> Assign to Columns. New pages: /dashboard/agents (list with status overview, filtering) and /dashboard/agents/[agentId] (detail with activity feed, edit form, Pause/Clone/Deactivate actions). Cockpit shows agent status overview widget.
features.test: Playwright: complete 4-step wizard -> agent in /dashboard/agents list. /dashboard/agents/[id] shows activity feed. Pause button changes status badge to paused.

features.name: Category Deprecation (Phase 5)
features.spec: Drop migrated_from_category_id from agents. Drop category_id from tasks, board_steps, conversations, knowledge_docs, provider_agents. Drop category_skills, pilot_configs, categories tables. Remove CategoriesService, CategoriesController, CategoriesModule, frontend category components and use-categories hook. Clean all TypeScript references to categories.
features.test: npm run build succeeds with zero references to categories table or CategoriesService. No 404s on existing board/task/pod views in Playwright.
